headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of DoorDash (DASH)
summary: DoorDash’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 31.7% of its value and falling to $179.75 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Chef Robotics escaped the robot cooking graveyard and says it’s thriving — here’s why
summary: The company, which deploys AI-guided robot arms for food production, says it is looking to expand its services to provide for a broader array of customers.

headline: Trump Declares Victory On Hormuz — Nasdaq's 13-Day Streak Is Historic
